title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Yamato, Momonosuke, Unknown person #15, Nami as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go all out and take Kaido down once and for all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you Samural have a screw loose?! We're all done for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And?! so what if we are?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think this is gonna kill me? I'm surviving this, no matter what!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that tremor made the Seastone nail come loose...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn you... at least this way... I can take you with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your dear daughter is going to accompany me to hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Onigashima is in the way!! Move it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he prepared to punch through the island?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
